steps.summary: Added kifrs/feedback/case_intake.py, kifrs/feedback/__init__.py, and tests/test_real_case_feedback.py. CaseIntake validates public-safe anonymized case inputs, blocks raw body/customer identifier fields and Korean business/resident id patterns, and accepts only structured facts plus requested output labels. Verification: python -m pytest tests/test_real_case_feedback.py -q -> 9 passed, with existing .pytest_cache warning.

Implemented ReviewerCorrection in kifrs/feedback/case_intake.py. Corrections capture issue, severity, suggested_fix, missing_evidence, disposition, and affected_outputs without source payload. case_to_eval_seed_candidate converts a validated case/correction pair into an eval/backlog candidate and enforces matching case_id.

Implemented route_case and RoutingCandidate. Routing distinguishes KIFRS1109/KIFRS1115/KIFRS1116 review-pack candidates by minimum structured fact keys, returns needs_more_facts when incomplete, and keeps TAX/DEAL/VALUATION/KSOX/AUDIT_ONLY out of scope.

Added scripts/real_case_feedback_report.py and generated docs/reports/2026-07-05-rc4-real-case-feedback-loop-report.md. Close gate passed: tests/test_real_case_feedback.py and tests/test_source_aware_rebuild.py -> 13 passed; quality_preflight ok/public_safe True; git diff --check only LF->CRLF warnings. Recommended next horizon is feedback-eval-backlog-integration.
